title: Fragrant Japanese Tofu Hot-Pot
description: A tangy and adventurous Japanese dish featuring whole black peppercorns and rest-meat, perfect for a lacto-vegetarian friendly meal
instructions: In a large hot-pot vessel, combine dashi broth, soy sauce, mirin, and whole black peppercorns, and bring to a boil over high heat
Reduce the heat to medium-low and add the sliced rest-meat, cooking until browned, about 5 minutes
Add the sliced green onions and shimeji mushrooms to the pot, cooking until the mushrooms are tender, about 3 minutes
Add the firm tofu to the pot, cooking until heated through, about 2 minutes
Season the hot-pot with salt to taste
Serve the hot-pot immediately, garnished with additional green onions and whole black peppercorns if desired
Drizzle the hot-pot with sesame oil before serving
Offer steamed rice or noodles on the side, if desired
